meta_title: For Founders: user onboarding to Solve can't finish projects (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't finish projects. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: User Onboarding to Solve Can't Finish Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS build. Master user onboarding to drive retention and revenue. A beginner-friendly checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The root cause of unfinished projects is a lack of feedback loops. By implementing a lean, high-velocity onboarding flow, you validate your value proposition instantly. Use Antigravity for rapid architectural scaffolding and Claude Code to iterate on user flows, ensuring every feature you build is tied directly to user retention.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS is littered with 'perfect' codebases that never saw a single paying user. You feel the stagnation—the endless cycles of feature creep, the 'finish line' that keeps receding, and the gnawing realization that your product isn't solving a real problem. You aren't failing because you can't code; you're failing because you aren't building a bridge to your user's success.

True velocity isn't about writing more lines of code; it's about reducing the time from 'sign-up' to 'Aha! moment.' By focusing your development efforts on high-impact user onboarding, you transform a stagnant project into a living, revenue-generating engine. Let’s stop the cycle of unfinished builds and start shipping value that users actually demand.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves your user gets value. If they don't hit this, they churn. Focus exclusively on the path of least resistance to this event.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my core feature set and identify the single most impactful 'Aha!' moment for a first-time user. Propose a 3-step onboarding flow that minimizes friction.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'Create a user journey map for the identified Aha! moment, focusing on reducing clicks to under 3.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a clean, modular onboarding interface that guides the user without overwhelming them with options.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modern, responsive React onboarding component with progress tracking and clear CTA buttons for user data collection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /run 'npm install lucide-react && create onboarding-flow component'

steps.title: Automate Data Capture
steps.description: Build a lean backend process that captures just enough user data to personalize their experience, avoiding the 'long form' death trap.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a secure, lightweight API endpoint to save user onboarding progress to the database using Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /fix 'Implement a schema migration for user_onboarding_status and update the API route'

steps.title: Integrate Behavioral Triggers
steps.description: Set up automated follow-ups if a user drops off during onboarding. This prevents your project from becoming 'unfinished' in the eyes of your users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a background worker script that checks for incomplete onboarding sessions and triggers a reminder email.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /ask 'How do I schedule a background job for onboarding abandonment?'

steps.title: Measure and Iterate
steps.description: Deploy analytics to track onboarding completion rates. If the drop-off is high, use Claude Code to refactor the specific step causing friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement PostHog tracking events in my onboarding flow to measure conversion at each step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude /review 'Ensure all onboarding steps are tracked correctly in the production build'

pro_tips: Hide the 'Skip' button. Force users to engage with your value proposition until they reach the Aha! moment.
Personalize the UI based on the first question asked; if they are a 'Founder', show ROI metrics, if a 'Dev', show API docs.
Use micro-copy that focuses on the user's pain, not your product's features.
Implement 'optimistic UI'—make the app feel instantaneous even when the backend is still processing.
Never ask for a credit card until the user has successfully completed the primary onboarding flow.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, run 10 user sessions using a tool like FullStory or Hotjar to watch where they get stuck, then use Claude Code to fix those specific bottlenecks immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in a vacuum and start shipping products that users crave. By mastering the onboarding flow, you ensure your project actually crosses the finish line. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
